system.description: The corrupted character is a time bomb waiting to go off. Treat his body as a grenade. Acid is thrown across the zone he was occupying, coating everyone who was hit by the explosion. Anyone outside of the initial burst radius but within the zone must make a Prowess saving throw or be coated. The acid inflicts 5/W3 at the beginning of each of the affected characters’ turns until a Full action can be spent removing the acid.
